prompt: Create a dramatic premium sports shoe advertisement in a dark studio with cinematic black-and-gold lighting. A single athletic male model is captured in an explosive action pose from an extreme low-angle wide-lens perspective, with one oversized sneaker thrust toward the camera so it dominates the foreground. He is mid-leap or lunging forward, one knee bent, one arm stretched outward, wearing a metallic bronze bomber jacket over a black fitted shirt, black athletic shorts, black crew socks with a small gold triangular logo, and sleek black-and-gold running sneakers. The shoe design should feel futuristic and luxury-focused, with black mesh panels, glossy black leather overlays, metallic gold accents, gold eyelets, branded tongue detail, and a sculptural open heel support element. Add glowing gold energy streaks, sparks, debris, and an impact burst radiating from the ground beneath the lead shoe, with a glossy reflective floor catching the highlights. In the background, place huge illuminated golden typography reading VOLTEX and smaller text reading ELITE, integrated behind the athlete as part of the composition. Use high contrast, sharp detail, commercial fashion photography styling, dynamic motion blur only in the particles and light trails, luxurious premium athletic branding, and a bold hero-shot composition suitable for a footwear campaign. Include 2 visible shoes, 2 visible socks, 1 jacket, 1 shirt, and 1 pair of shorts. Add a small top-right corner watermark area with the text insMind and GPT Image 2. Keep the palette predominantly black, bronze, and glowing gold.
